title: ANC - UI
scenario: Transparency/Environment and Speech sub-settings remain disabled/greyed out when ANC/Adaptive is enabled on Poly device
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Select ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) or Transparency Mode.
Observe the default state of the ANC/Transparency screen.
expected: The UI screen shows two sections: ANC (with Adaptive and Standard sub-settings) and Transparency (with Environment and Speech sub-settings). ANC/Adaptive is ON by default. Transparency/Environment is OFF with all values disabled/greyed out. Adaptive mode description reads: "Automatically adjusts to provide the best ANC experience." Standard mode description reads: "Provide a more natural audio experience and enhanced sidetone comfort." Environment description reads: "Optimized to hear your surroundings." Speech description reads: "Best for face-to-face communication."
